title: arctium neurocentrum
intro: Arctium neurocentrum, also known as the bur marigold or lesser burdock, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Arctium neurocentrum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and even help lower blood pressure. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
